NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100106901) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALABBO, PRECILA HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-2020 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-08-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-21-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Precila Balabbo's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Oct-21-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
